stitch_fallback_reason: Stitch generation not invoked for this build. Direct HTML/CSS composition used. Site visual personality (Singapore-institutional + operational-floor texture, navy/orange/cream, planogram backgrounds) is deliberately specific and would not benefit from Stitch's generic SaaS-screen output. Per dt-site-creator pitfall 'static-palette-reuse', each Elitez sub-brand site needs a unique identity, which is easier to achieve with handwritten markup against the locked sitemap.

font_pairing.headline: Source Serif 4
font_pairing.rationale: Source Serif 4 for the institutional Singapore-government register (BCA / MOM / WSG aesthetic); Inter for B2B body legibility; IBM Plex Mono for stat readouts, eyebrows, and KPI labels — mono signals 'operational data', not 'tech-bro-startup'.

components.notes: Visually hidden until focused. First focusable element on every page.
Fixed top, navy on white with thin border-bottom. No glass-morphism — institutional register prefers solid surface.
Elitez logo 36px tall on desktop, paired with 'Merchandising' wordmark in Source Serif 4 navy.
Mono uppercase 0.72rem letters; active state has 2px navy underline.
Hamburger ≤768px with aria-expanded; animated to X on open.
Slides down from header. JS toggles .is-open + aria-expanded.
60/40 grid on desktop, stacked on mobile. Visual slot holds inline SVG of a stylised supermarket shelf.
Inline SVG showing a 3-shelf gondola with planogram squares, navy linework on cream. Decorative only, aria-hidden.
4-cell grid on desktop, 2x2 on tablet, stacked on mobile. Values in mono.
Responsive auto-fit grid with min(280px, 100%).
White card, thin border, subtle hover lift. Mono label at top, serif title, body.
Tinted card-hi surface with planogram-grid background pattern. EMR-Intel teaser lives here.
Subtle repeating-linear-gradient evoking shelf rows. ~6% opacity, pointer-events none.
Text-based client chips (no logo files licensed for this build). Grayscale by default, navy on hover.
5-up on desktop, 2-up on tablet, 1-up on mobile. Inline SVG icon per industry.
Horizontal 4-up strip with mono label + retailer names.
Compact accreditation badges with thin navy border and small label/issuer pair.
Tinted card-hi surface, never full orange. One primary + one secondary CTA.
Navy background, white text. Hover: bright orange #F26522 background, white text.
Transparent with navy outline. Hover: navy fill, white text.
Text link with chevron, navy → orange on hover.
Eyebrow (mono) + h2 (serif) + body. Used as section header pattern.
Numbered 01–04 service blocks with feature list and 'Best fit' line.
5-step engagement model — vertical stack on mobile, horizontal on desktop.
Tinted band for service standards, language list, replacement promise.
Inline band linking to /emr-intel.html from /services.html.
Mobile-app / QuickView feature block with capability list.
EMR-Intel page tabs (Mobile / QuickView / BI). Keyboard accessible.
BI dashboard surfaces — 3-col grid with title + description.
2-column KPI definitions; mono KPI name, body description.
Plain text section for story / compliance / integration blocks.
Backed-by-Elitez-Group band with logo and CTA out to elitez.com.sg.
Jack Wang card with initials avatar (no photo yet), title, bio, email, phone.
Singapore HQ primary card + regional context note.
Direct-contact card on /contact.html with email/phone/calendar.
Formspree-targeted form with PDPA consent. Action placeholder: https://formspree.io/f/PLACEHOLDER_FORM_ID. JS validates client-side; server-side handled by Formspree.
Address with hours and visit-by-appointment note.
Native <details>/<summary>. No JS needed for accordion behavior. Markdown bold rendered with a tiny vanilla parser.
Single-stat band — used for retention figure on /clients.html.
Generic engagement-pattern strip (no client-named cases per brief constraint).
404 hero with code, headline, body.
Recovery destinations on 404 page.
4-column footer + bottom bar with attribution and rights line.

icon_set.approach: Inline SVG, curated set (~10 icons). No external icon library. Each icon ~24px viewBox, 1.5px stroke, currentColor.

interactions.tab_strip: JS switches .tab-strip__btn[aria-selected] and shows matching .tab-strip__panel. Arrow-key navigation supported.
interactions.form_validation: Client-side required-field + email pattern + PDPA-consent check before Formspree submit.
interactions.scroll_reveal: Optional .reveal opacity transition gated by prefers-reduced-motion. Disabled by default; opt-in per element.

color_discipline.navy_use: Headings, body text on light, primary CTA fill, nav text, logo person-icon background.
color_discipline.orange_use: Hover state on primary CTA, eyebrow accent stripe (4px), small status dots, in-wordmark highlight in logo. NEVER as section background.
color_discipline.neutral_use: White surfaces, cream #FAFAF8 page background, card-hi #F4F5F2 for tinted bands, navy on light = body.

a11y.aria_labels: Every <section> has aria-labelledby pointing at its heading id; nav has aria-label; nav-toggle has aria-expanded + aria-controls.
a11y.focus_visible: 2px solid var(--accent2) outline with 2px offset on all interactive elements.
a11y.color_contrast: --text #0B1E36 vs --bg #FAFAF8 = 14.8:1 (AAA). --muted #4B5563 vs --bg = 7.7:1 (AAA body). All within WCAG AA+.
a11y.reduced_motion: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) disables all transitions, scroll-reveal opacity, and tab-fade animations.
